title: dortmanna ehrenbergii
intro: Dortmanna ehrenbergii, also known as the Chinese dodder or Dodder vine, is a type of parasitic plant that belongs to the family Cuscutaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dortmanna ehrenbergii are said to include improving circulation, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and processed into teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are believed to enhance its medicinal properties.
